blocks.content:
# Synthetic Test Fixture: Always Passes

This guide is a deterministic test fixture for the E2E CLI and orchestration layer. Every step targets stable, always-present Grafana UI elements and should complete successfully in any Grafana environment.
Step 1: Highlight the Dashboards nav item. This element is always present in the Grafana sidebar.
blocks.tooltip: Deterministic pass — targets a stable nav element.

blocks.content: Step 2: Highlight the Explore nav item. Marked skippable as a secondary validation.
blocks.tooltip: Deterministic pass — targets a stable nav element.
